{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260320124005BFA039AB975F990DCF0F"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7437200761666274072","common":{"comment_type":21,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"穿越成李建成，距离玄武门之变还有三年，为了不丢穿越者的脸，他说服李渊，组建海军。三年后，李世民的秦王府里，李承乾不见了。二弟，吾知你跟随父亲南征北讨手下能人猛将也多，等到父亲老了传位之时，二弟如何自处，手下兄弟也希望更进一步。吾不愿见到兄弟砌墙，本是同根生，相煎何太急。另外你这个嫡长子我带走了，原因嘛，写在信背面。李世民难以相信，自己的大哥竟然设身处地的为他着想，更难以相信的是他看到信背面的内容，李承乾的一生简化版。算了，或许承乾是对的。大哥，原来三年前你组建海军，就是为了去海外。李建成带着李承乾已经登入倭寇岛，没啥说的，净化这些畜牲。金山银山。两年后，更加强大的海军出发了，美洲大陆我来了。《大唐太子跑路了","text_exts":[{"e":56,"s":53,"text":"李承乾","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9D%8E%E6%89%BF%E4%B9%BE&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231773981605990DCF0F%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227437200761666274072%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227363226519612705854%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9D%8E%E6%89%BF%E4%B9%BE%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1731624537,"group_id":"7363226519612705854","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5CWCRPApgr5oq/C0cHSFotav2Q56BiyPPLEMRLMI2JJ","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"4169820558854461","user_name":"马运福禄"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"4169820558854461","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":true,"sticker":{"expire_t 我独我，世间第一等，此方最上乘。
